reviewer_note: EngineRPM is available and the synthetic source has data for any window; refused for want of a time range on an answerable question. Agent answered the same class (cap_001/002) by choosing a window.

run_diagnostic_rules ran (rules_run=[coolant_rising_under_moderate_load], skipped=[]) so "no findings" is a real negative, not absence-as-negation. Coolant 86-93 degC matches ground truth (min 86.5/max 93.5); not overheating. High confidence warranted.

window_too_large error on summarize_session was recovered by narrowing via get_signal, not absorbed as a false negative. Cited min 30.515/max 49.472 match ground truth (30.5/49.5). Mild overconfidence stating exact extremes from a 1000-sample decimation, but values are correct.
CoolantTemp available; trend is answerable over a chosen window (cf. cap_001). Refused for want of a time range.
"cooling-system problems in this session" is answerable via run_diagnostic_rules over a window; cap_002 answered "the session" by defaulting to a day. Refused instead.
RearCameraActive/GearPosition genuinely absent from available signals; signal_unavailable refusal with a correct hint. Headline graceful-refusal success (seed marks this unanswerable).
TirePressure genuinely absent; correct signal_unavailable refusal (seed marks this unanswerable).
"Summarize the session" is what summarize_session is for; refused with ZERO tool calls (did not even list signals). Answerable class the agent handled in cap_002.
